docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT UNG, SANDRA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, ALFONSO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNG, SANDRA $376.63 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $451.63, DEFENDANT ALSO AGREES TO WAIVE HER CLAIMS FOR OWNED RENTS FOR PLAINTIFFS' EARLY TERMINATION. SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-23-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-23-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF ALFONSO RAMIREZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ANDREW RAMIREZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SHARI RAMIREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SANDRA UNG IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY MELANIE PAN WITH CAMBODIAN INTERPRETATION. MS. PAN WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK, R. SAHATJIAN. HEARD WITH CASE #S 20-863575 & 20-863576. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RAMIREZ, ALFONSO AS TO DEFENDANT UNG, SANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-23-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
